reviews.comment:
Siempre voy a esta sucursal cada vez que viajo a Bahía blanca. Es práctica su ubicación, los baños están impecables, nunca está excesivamente cargada de gente y siempre me atendieron bien

(Translated by Google)
I always go to this branch whenever I travel to Bahía Blanca. It's conveniently located, the restrooms are spotless, it's never overcrowded, and I've always received excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvaF9XNWJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me gustaría saber qué decía a que a mi que me la guardes no porque para yo poder hacer la transferencia del pago y la diferencia que hay un pueblo argentino utilizar la información de carácter confidencial y está dirigida y exclusivamente a para que lo se por que que me la soba

(Translated by Google)
I would like to know what it said, so you can keep it for me, no, because in order for me to make the payment transfer, and the difference is that there is an Argentine town that uses confidential information and it is addressed exclusively to me, so I know it because I care about it.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen Servicio de expendio de combustible y de bar.. quiero remarcar la excelente atención que tuve en el estacionamiento interno del lugar...no recuerdo el nombre del Señor..fué muy detallado y preciso en la trasmisión del conocimiento de la zona...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station and bar. I want to highlight the outstanding service I received in the parking lot. I don't recall the gentleman's name, but he was very thorough and precise in sharing his knowledge of the area.
